source: Rise of the Runelords Anniversary Edition — Chapter 1: Burnt Offerings

npcs.name: Nualia Tobyn
npcs.hook: Adopted daughter of Desnan priest Ezakien Tobyn; faked her death in the Old Light fire and returned bearing a demonic red talon, bent on burning Sandpoint as an offering to her chosen goddess.

npcs.name: Tsuto Kaijitsu
npcs.hook: Illegitimate half-elf child of Lonjiku Kaijitsu; Ameiko's half-brother. Beaten and disowned as a boy, he returned with Nualia to betray Sandpoint and murder his father at the Glassworks.

npcs.name: Lyrie Akenja
npcs.hook: Enchantment specialist researching the catacombs' Thassilonian runes and Karzoug-era history; carrying on a reluctant affair with Orik.

npcs.name: Orik Vancaskerkin
npcs.hook: Out-of-work Chelish mercenary hired by Nualia as muscle; increasingly uncomfortable with the cult's zealotry and potentially turnable by the PCs.

npcs.name: Bruthazmus
npcs.hook: Infamous bugbear-blooded bandit who has raided the Lost Coast for years; allied with Nualia after she promised him Shalelu's head on a pike.

npcs.name: Gogmurt
npcs.hook: Tribe's long-time spiritual advisor; spurned by Ripnugget in favor of Nualia's promises and now sulking in the thorn thicket with his fire-pelt cougar Tangletooth.

npcs.name: Chief Ripnugget
npcs.hook: Riding his gecko-like mount Stickfoot, Ripnugget has bet the tribe's future on Nualia's raid; keeps a captured Shoanti warhorse as a trophy.

npcs.name: Erylium
npcs.role: Cult leader of the Catacombs of Wrath
npcs.hook: Ancient quasit witch left as caretaker of the Thassilonian runewell; mentored Nualia during her Magnimar years and now leads the sinspawn revival.

npcs.name: Koruvus
npcs.hook: Once a hero of the Seven Tooth tribe, his head swells with a taint from the runewell; now acts as Erylium's feral enforcer.

npcs.name: Malfeshnekor
npcs.hook: Sealed beneath Thistletop by ancient Thassilonian magic; exerts an empathic link with the goblins above, who unknowingly worship him. Nualia's ultimate prize.
